description: Unify builds AI assistants/agents for business workflows, including messaging, calls, and tool-connected task handling. Its docs also describe Unity, an open-source agent runtime that connects to Unify’s hosted backend for persistence and messaging.
summary: unify.ai exposes a documented REST API at `https://api.unify.ai/v0` authenticated by a Unify API key, plus an open-source Python CLI sandbox that uses the same key via `UNIFY_KEY`.
